workflows.title: Orchestrate
workflows.description: Parallel or multi-phase execution with subagent delegation.
workflows.successDefinition: Workstreams integrated and verified against acceptance criteria.

workflows.title: Brainstorm
workflows.description: Explore options and shape rough intent before planning.
workflows.successDefinition: Options are concrete enough to choose a plan direction.

workflows.title: Work
workflows.description: Guided step-by-step execution with explicit checkpoints.
workflows.successDefinition: Each step confirmed before the next executes.

workflows.title: Review
workflows.description: Independent review for quality, security, and completeness.

checkLane.title: Review Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Call out exact files or evidence for each finding.
Separate verified issues from suspected gaps.
Name the smallest useful follow-up test.

workflows.title: Debug
workflows.description: Root-cause analysis and minimal safe fixes.

checkLane.title: Debug Check Lane
verificationPrompts: State the repro or best available evidence.
Name what changed and how the repro was rechecked.
List remaining uncertainty if full repro was not possible.

workflows.title: Plan
workflows.successDefinition: Plan is executable with clear acceptance criteria.

workflows.title: Architecture
workflows.description: Architecture decisions, boundaries, and technical tradeoffs.
workflows.successDefinition: Decision and rejected alternatives are clear enough for implementation.

workflows.title: SCM
workflows.description: Git workflow, commits, PRs, and handoff hygiene.

workflows.title: Test Plan
workflows.description: Focused test planning and regression coverage recommendations.
workflows.successDefinition: Verification plan names concrete checks and residual gaps.

workflows.title: PR Summary
workflows.description: Reviewer-ready summary, verification notes, and risk handoff.
workflows.successDefinition: Reviewer can understand the change and verification quickly.

workflows.title: Release Checklist
workflows.description: Release readiness, rollout, rollback, docs, and verification checklist.
workflows.successDefinition: Release blockers and rollout evidence are explicit.

checkLane.title: Release Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Separate blockers from follow-ups.
Include rollout owner or monitoring expectation when known.
Name rollback trigger or decision point.

workflows.title: Incident Report
workflows.description: Incident/debug report with impact, timeline, root cause, fix, and prevention.
workflows.successDefinition: Incident evidence and prevention follow-ups are clear.

workflows.title: Migration Checklist
workflows.description: Migration steps, compatibility, verification, and rollback plan.
workflows.successDefinition: Migration can proceed with ordered checks and rollback.

checkLane.title: Migration Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Add a verification step for each risky transition.
Explain compatibility window and coexistence assumptions.
Call out rollback point before irreversible steps.

agents.title: PM planner subagent
agents.focus: Clarify scope, constraints, and next steps with the smallest useful question set.

agents.title: Question asker subagent
agents.focus: Clarify scope, constraints, and next steps with the smallest useful question set.

agents.title: Repo researcher subagent
agents.focus: Read narrowly, cite concrete files, and return evidence-backed findings only.

agents.title: Debug investigator subagent
agents.focus: Read narrowly, cite concrete files, and return evidence-backed findings only.

agents.title: Frontend engineer subagent
agents.focus: Implement the smallest change that satisfies the workflow contract and detected stack rules.
